title: stachyopsis maleolens
intro: Stachyopsis maleolens, also known as maleole, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, maleole has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. In herbal medicine, maleole is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional remedies for its antiseptic and expectorant properties.
